title: Incorrectly Optimized Longest Increasing Subsequence Finder

statement.markdown: Given a non-empty array of integers, return the length of the longest increasing subsequence (LIS). A **subsequence** is a sequence that can be derived from another sequence by deleting some elements without changing the order of the remaining elements.
statement.inputFormat: Input is a non-empty array of integers.
statement.outputFormat: Return the length of the longest increasing subsequence.
statement.notes: Time complexity of the solution should be O(n^2), but do not exceed this. Note that n is the array length.
